title: Trump Demands Iran’s ‘Unconditional Surrender’ as Israel Pounds Tehran and Lebanon
summary_full: Israel’s air forces shifted their focus back to Iran on Friday after a night of heavy bombardment in Lebanon, which was quickly becoming one of the largest fronts in the regional conflict.
summary_public: Israel’s air forces shifted their focus back to Iran on Friday after a night of heavy bombardment in Lebanon, which was quickly becoming one of the largest fronts in the regional conflict.
